questions.question: Compare and contrast IEEE 802.15.4g and IEEE 802.15.4e in terms of their frequency bands and applications. Which one is suitable for low-power wide-area networks (LPWANs) and why?
questions.hint: IEEE 802.15.4g and IEEE 802.15.4e are both based on the IEEE 802.15.4 standard, but they operate at different frequency bands and have different applications.

questions.question: What is the main difference between IEEE 802.11ah and LoRaWAN in terms of their key features and target applications? Which one is more suitable for IoT applications with high data rates?
questions.hint: IEEE 802.11ah and LoRaWAN are both low-power wireless communication technologies, but they have different key features and target applications.

questions.question: Explain the concept of NB-IoT and how it differs from LoRaWAN in terms of their frequency bands and energy efficiency. Which one is more suitable for IoT applications with high security requirements?
questions.hint: NB-IoT and LoRaWAN are both low-power wireless communication technologies, but they have different frequency bands and energy efficiency characteristics.
